title: Evan's Vanilla+ 2
description: A Vanilla+ Modpack for 1.21! It adds new mob mechanics, new world generation, dungeons, mobs, and items to Minecraft!
body:
# WELCOME TO MY 2ND MODPACK!
Hey again! I really enjoyed how my first modpack turned out for 1.20.1, but with the recent release with 1.21 and new dungeons/mechanics being added to Minecraft, I wanted to make another modpack with unique mods exclusive to this modpack, while still having some essence of my last one. 

**(I hope to do this to every Vanilla+ modpack I make, making each one a new adventure on it's own!)**

Returning mods such as Dungeons and Taverns will bring back exciting adventures you can conquer with your friends! Especially with the additions of new mobs,items, and blocks that come with 1.21, Dungeons and Taverns has been updated to include a total 31 new structures and 10 new enchantments!


## DISCLAIMER!
Because 1.21 was recently released, this modpack will be in "alpha/beta" versions for a while I am guessing.
Since Fabric may not support every mod I have planned for this modpack, I may switch from Fabric to Forge entirely in the future, only releasing Forge versions of the modpack from then on.

_This is all hypothetical however._


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

## Mods I have planned for this Modpack if they are updated to 1.21:
- [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)
- [Etcetera](https://modrinth.com/mod/etcetera)
- [Immersive Aircraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-aircraft)
- [Artifacts](https://modrinth.com/mod/artifacts)
- [Beans Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/beans-backpacks)
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
- [Alex's Mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs)
- [Alex's Caves](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-caves)

</details>
